mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, application_case_id, feature_type, status, credit_used, created_at FROM ai_usage_log WHERE id = #{aiUsageLogId} FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO credit_transaction (user_id, ai_usage_log_id, type, amount, balance_after, feature_type, reason) VALUES (#{userId}, #{aiUsageLogId}, #{type}, #{amount}, #{balanceAfter}, #{featureType}, #{reason})
